----------------------------------- ModelSim (https://www.mentor.com/modelsim) is a hardware simulation and debug environment primarily targeted at smaller ASIC and FPGA design. Calibre (https://www.mentor.com/calibre) is a suite of tools

tps://www.mentor.com/calibre) is a suite of tools for IC design and verification. These are from Siemens Calibre (http://mentor.com). They are available for Instructional use in 119 and 125 Cory (Windows). See https://www.mentor.com/com

Cory (Windows). See https://www.mentor.com/company/higher_ed/ for the ModelSim Student Edition. Licenses -------- Licenses for these products are served from an instructional license server. For EECS-affiliated grad students, faculty and s

d listing the licensed products. We are licensed for Design Verification & Test (includes ModelSim) IC Nanometer Design (includes Calibre) These are part of the Higher Education Program (HEP). For more about HEP, see http://www.me
